headline: Jersey Central Power & Light Company Provides Update on Exchange Offer for its 4.600% Senior Notes Due 2030
summary: On July 16, 2026, Jersey Central Power & Light Company ("JCP&L" or the "Company"), a subsidiary of FirstEnergy Corp., announced an offer to exchange up to $350 million aggregate principal amount of its outstanding unregistered 4.600% Senior Notes due 2030 (the "Outstanding Notes") for a like principal amount of the Company's 4.600% Senior Notes due 2030 (the "New Notes") registered under the Securities Act of 1933, as amended.
